notes: Section 'Espaçamento' (id 2367:1405) defines a base-8 spacing system. The legend explicitly lists 24px, 16px and 8px and instructs that any adapted measure must be a multiple of 8.

base_unit.rule: All spacing must be a multiple of 8.

xs.note: Not explicitly defined in the legend; 4px is below the base-8 rule, so do not assume it.

xl.note: Not explicitly defined; extend in multiples of 8 (32, 40, ...) if needed and document it.

gaps_padding.note: Specific component gap/padding tokens are not declared as named tokens in the identity manual. Use the base-8 scale (8/16/24) for gaps and padding.

grid.note: An explicit column grid (columns, gutter, margins) was not declared as numeric tokens in node 2:21. Composition is shown by example. Validate before assuming a grid.

containers.note: No container max-width tokens were declared in the identity manual.
